input.hiring_signal_brief: 2 open engineering roles posted — up -3 in the last 60 days. Python roles: 1. Layoff event in the last 120 days: {'date': '2026-03-11', 'headcount': 85, 'percent': 0.12}.
input.bench_summary: Tenacious provides pre-vetted senior engineers on 2-week deployment timelines. Available bench: ML (5), Python/Backend (6), Fullstack (4), Data (3). NestJS stack committed through Q3 2026 on Modo Compass engagement.

dimensions.name: banned_phrase_check
dimensions.description: No banned phrases from Tenacious style guide.
dimensions.check_value: end-to-end|loop you in|circle back|hope this finds you well|best-in-class|just wanted to|leverage|reach out|touch base|synergy|just following up|circling back|synergize|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: signal_reference_check
dimensions.description: Must reference at least one hiring signal from the brief.

dimensions.name: calendar_link_check
dimensions.description: Must contain a calendar booking link.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge scores on 5 Tenacious tone markers. Pass = avg >= 4/5.

dimensions.name: word_count_check
dimensions.description: Cold outreach body must be <= 120 words (Style Guide v2 formatting constraint).
